ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., water, buffer, host) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the sample */,
  "source_plate" TEXT /* Source plate where the sample is located */,
  "source_well" TEXT /* Source well in the plate */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the sample */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reagents" (
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reagent */,
  "reagent_name" TEXT /* Name of the reagent */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the reagent */,
  "source_plate" TEXT /* Source plate where the reagent is located */,
  "source_well" TEXT /* Source well in the plate */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the reagent */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the reagent */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the reagent was acquired */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the reagent expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reagent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preparation_methods" (
  "prep_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preparation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the preparation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preparation method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the preparation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prep_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injection_methods" (
  "injection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the injection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injection method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the injection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "analysis_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the analysis method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rinse_sources" (
  "rinse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rinse source */,
  "rinse_name" TEXT /* Name of the rinse source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rinse source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the rinse source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rinse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "save_sample_destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_plate" TEXT /* Plate where the sample is saved */,
  "destination_well" TEXT /* Well in the plate where the sample is saved */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Storage condition for the sample (e.g., 4°C, -20°C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "lab" TEXT /* Laboratory where the researcher works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., PI, postdoc, graduate student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_samples" (
  "experiment_sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sample in the experiment (e.g., control, test) */,
  "volume_used" REAL /* Volume of the sample used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_samples_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_reagents" (
  "experiment_reagent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "reagent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reagent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reagent in the experiment (e.g., buffer, guest) */,
  "volume_used" REAL /* Volume of the reagent used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_reagents_reagent_id FOREIGN KEY ("reagent_id") REFERENCES reagents ("reagent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_reagents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_preparation_methods" (
  "experiment_prep_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "prep_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preparation method */,
  "protocol_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the protocol used for the preparation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_prep_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_preparation_methods_prep_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("prep_method_id") REFERENCES preparation_methods ("prep_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_preparation_methods_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_injection_methods" (
  "experiment_injection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "injection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injection method */,
  "protocol_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the protocol used for the injection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_injection_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_injection_methods_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_injection_methods_injection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("injection_method_id") REFERENCES injection_methods ("injection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_analysis_methods" (
  "experiment_analysis_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "analysis_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method */,
  "protocol_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the protocol used for the analysis method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_analysis_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_analysis_methods_analysis_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("analysis_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_analysis_methods_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_rinse_sources" (
  "experiment_rinse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "rinse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rinse source */,
  "volume_used" REAL /* Volume of the rinse source used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_rinse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_rinse_sources_rinse_id FOREIGN KEY ("rinse_id") REFERENCES rinse_sources ("rinse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_rinse_sources_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_save_sample_destinations" (
  "experiment_destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Storage condition for the sample (e.g., 4°C, -20°C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_save_sample_destinations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_save_sample_destinations_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES save_sample_destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "experiment_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the result of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "experiment_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
